name: fairytail
description: Minimal implementation guidance with deterministic, beginner-friendly explanations.

interface.longDescription: Keep implementation compact, then explain verified results with fixed facts, bounded analogies, explicit safety limits, and the user's preferred language.
defaultPrompt: Explain this verified result for a coding beginner.
Use Fairytail to explain API, MCP, tokens, servers, and databases.
Keep the implementation minimal and the explanation beginner-friendly.
